title: German Chickpea Falafel Bites
description: A German twist on traditional falafel, served as bite-sized treats perfect for snacking.
instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
In a large bowl, mash chickpeas using a fork or potato masher.
Add melted butter, flour, and mix until a dough forms.
Wrap dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
Using a cookie scoop or spoon, drop dough into oil, making sure not to overcrowd.
Fry falafel for 3-4 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
Using a slotted spoon, remove falafel from oil and place on paper towels to drain excess oil.
Optional: Serve with a side of German-style mustard or a dollop of tzatziki sauce.
